message: beads: add viz binning toggle tasks

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,11 @@
 {"id":"bd-24q.11.2","title":"Phase Map: Overlay Rendering + Phase Interactions","description":"Render phase segments into the main charts and timeline dock:
- Subtle tinted bands behind the line/stack chart; labels that don't clutter.
- Hover/tap reveals phase summary (duration, mean/var, top buckets).
- Clicking a phase filters commit list + outlier panel + section summary to that segment; toggle to clear filter.
- URL state stores selected phase id + metric used for segmentation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:29.138788860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:29.138788860Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:29.138788860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.11.3","title":"Phase Map: Unit Tests (Synthetic Change-Point Sequences)","description":"Unit tests:
- Synthetic piecewise-stationary sequences (2-5 segments) with controlled noise; assert change points detected within an index tolerance.
- Edge cases: constant series, single spike, gradual drift.
- Evidence ledger invariants: posterior/confidence in [0,1], segments cover all indices with no gaps/overlaps.

Diagnostics
- On failure, print the series, detected cps, and per-cp evidence summary.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:33.813419417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:33.813419417Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:33.813419417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.11.4","title":"Phase Map: E2E Tests (Toggle + Phase Filter)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Toggle phase overlay on/off; ensure chart renders without errors.
- Click/tap a phase band -> commit list and outlier list filter to that segment; clear filter restores full set.
- URL round-trip: copy permalink with phase selected; reload -> same phase is selected.

Diagnostics
- Log metric used, phase id, segment boundaries, and filtered commit count.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:39.710706475Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:39.710706475Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:39.710706475Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.12","title":"Viz: Commit-Time vs Wall-Clock Binning Toggle","description":"Goal
- Let users view the same evolution in two time coordinate systems:
  - Commit-time (index order): emphasizes sequence of edits.
  - Wall-clock time bins (day/hour/15m/5m): emphasizes bursts and pauses.

UX
- A simple toggle (Commit-time | Wall-clock) near the resolution controls.
- When wall-clock is on, bins that have 0 commits should still render (to show quiet periods).

Implementation Notes
- Requires reliable timestamp parsing for commits; define a single canonical timezone for binning (likely local or UTC, but must be explicit and consistent).
- Aggregation functions must be well-defined for all metrics (sum for counts, mean/median for rates); document each.
- Persist in URL state.

Acceptance Criteria
- Switching modes is instantaneous after first compute; charts and heat stripe update consistently.

Testing
- Unit tests for bin boundaries across DST and timezone offsets (use fixed ISO timestamps).
- E2E: toggle mode and verify bin count / labels change deterministically.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:50.352051887Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:50.352051887Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:50.352051887Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.12.1","title":"Binning: Wall-Clock Series Builder (Fill Empty Bins)","description":"Implement wall-clock binning:
- Inputs: commit timestamps (ISO), selected bin size (day/hour/15m/5m), timezone mode (UTC vs local).
- Output: dense bin array with explicit empty bins (0 commits) so quiet periods are visible.
- Aggregate metrics per bin with defined semantics (sum, mean, median).
- Ensure bin labeling is stable and readable.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:54.942854904Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:54.942854904Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.1","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:54.942854904Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.12.2","title":"Binning Toggle: UI + URL State + Chart Consistency","description":"Wire the binning mode toggle into the UX:
- Toggle near resolution controls; tooltip explains the difference.
- Ensure all charts (timeline, stacked buckets, donut, BOCPD/phase) read the same unified aggregation layer.
- URL state: mode=commit|wall + timezone mode (utc|local).
- Add a small "bin info" chip (bin size, bin count, empty bin count) for transparency.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:02.328884847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:02.328884847Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:02.328884847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.12.3","title":"Binning: Unit Tests (Timezone/DST Boundaries)","description":"Unit tests:
- Fixed ISO timestamps around DST transitions; assert correct bin assignment in UTC and in local mode.
- Empty bins: ensure they're present and labeled correctly.
- Aggregation semantics: sums/means/medians match reference calculations for a small dataset.

Diagnostics
- On failure: print timestamps, computed bin keys, and expected vs actual series.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:06.778931537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:06.778931537Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:06.778931537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.12.4","title":"Binning: E2E Tests (Toggle + Bin Count Assertions)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Toggle commit-time -> wall-clock; assert chart x-axis labels change and bin count differs.
- Toggle timezone mode (if exposed): ensure labels update deterministically.
- URL round-trip: share link preserves mode and resolution.

Diagnostics
- Log mode, resolution, bin count, empty bin count, and first/last label.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:11.240114818Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:11.240114818Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:11.240114818Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.2","title":"Viz: Heading Mini-Map + Changed-Section Highlighting","description":"Add a left-side (desktop) / slide-over (mobile) heading mini-map generated from the rendered markdown, with per-commit indicators for which headings changed. Clicking a heading scrolls the doc pane; diff view can auto-scroll to first change under that heading.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.3","title":"Viz: Shareable Permalinks (URL State) + Copy Link","description":"Encode visualization state in the URL (commit idx, tab, resolution, metric, bucket filters). Add a Copy Link button. Deep links should load without needing any server logic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.4","title":"Viz: Story Mode (Curated Milestones + Autoplay)","description":"Add an optional narrative layer: curated milestones (hand-picked commits) with short annotations and an autoplay scrubber. Desktop: right-side timeline card; Mobile: full-screen swipeable cards.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
